title: draba incana var. ramosissima
intro: Draba incana var. ramosissima, also known as the branching draba or branching whitlow grass, is a plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues, skin problems, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and flowers are used in herbal preparations to provide health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing skin irritations. Draba incana var. ramosissima can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
